documentation_impact.rationale: Intake stage adds a new Feature folder, a canonical Engineering Spec, and a per-Feature index under lib/memory/features/active-memory-context-economy-pass-2/. The librarian post_run obligation and the global lib/memory/features/index.json both depend on the new spec citation, so documentation-impact applies.

deferred_items.rationale: The global lib/memory/features/index.json is a librarian-owned generated artifact; its registration of the new feature_id moves to the librarian post_run stage rather than into the intake commit.
The glossary entry for memory-tier vocabulary is required by Layer 1 noun discipline at implementation time; intake stage records the deferral and binds it to the implementation slice.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Intake-analyst writes only inside lib/memory/features/active-memory-context-economy-pass-2/ and archive/work/172997_05-09-26/10920_2058_intake-active-memory-context-economy-pass-2/, preserves the inbox-notes ban, and stages diffs locally without push. Spec preserves AGENTS self-protection, dual-anchor citations, and Layer 1 lint discipline.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Documentation-impact and deferral entries comply with the documentation-stewardship clause; the human remains in-loop because the spec routes downstream protected-surface edits behind the human_approval gate.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Spec keeps PRD §7 feature-delivery intake stage gates intact, retains the loop.max_rounds=5 ceiling (zero clarifying rounds posted), and binds the human_approval gate to a pending operator ratification.
